SEARCH
Package io.github.lengors.scoutdesk.domain.io.exceptions

Class LoadDataFormatException

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Throwable
java.lang.Exception
java.lang.RuntimeException
io.github.lengors.scoutdesk.domain.io.exceptions.LoadDataException
io.github.lengors.scoutdesk.domain.io.exceptions.LoadDataFormatException
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public final class LoadDataFormatException extends LoadDataException
Thrown to indicate that the data being processed is in an invalid or unexpected format. This exception is a specific subtype of LoadDataException, providing a context for errors where the format of the data causes processing failures.

It can be instantiated with an optional JsonProcessingException or IllegalArgumentException as the cause, or without a specific cause.

See Also:

    Modifier and Type

    Description
    static final String
    MESSAGE
    Contains the default error message for exceptions related to invalid data format encountered during input processing.

  • Field Details

    • MESSAGE

      public static final String MESSAGE
      Contains the default error message for exceptions related to invalid data format encountered during input processing. This message is used to describe the nature of the issue when an unexpected or improper data format is detected.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

  • Constructor Details

    • LoadDataFormatException

      public LoadDataFormatException(Object source, com.fasterxml.jackson.core.JsonProcessingException cause)
      Constructs a new LoadDataFormatException with the specified data source and JsonProcessingException as the cause. This constructor is used when a JSON processing error occurs, indicating an invalid or unexpected data format during the loading process.
      Parameters:
      source - the source related to the cause of the exception; can represent the data being processed or its origin.
      cause - the underlying JsonProcessingException that caused this exception.

    • LoadDataFormatException

      public LoadDataFormatException(Object source, IllegalArgumentException cause)
      Constructs a new LoadDataFormatException with the specified data source and IllegalArgumentException as the cause. This constructor is used when an illegal argument error occurs, indicating an invalid or unexpected data format during the loading process.
      Parameters:
      source - the source related to the cause of the exception; can represent the data being processed or its origin.
      cause - the underlying IllegalArgumentException that caused this exception.

    • LoadDataFormatException

      public LoadDataFormatException(Object source)
      Constructs a new LoadDataFormatException with the specified data source. This constructor is used when an invalid or unexpected data format is encountered during the loading process, but no specific cause is provided.
      Parameters:
      source - the source related to the cause of the exception; can represent the data being processed or its origin.
